data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Elements are designed to be quickly accessible and selectable for efficient user interaction.
data.technical_spec: Large clickable areas for primary actions, intuitive placement.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Consolidation of user options to reduce decision-making time.
data.technical_spec: Minimalist design with clear, concise choices on interfaces.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Aesthetic design is perceived as easier to use, leading to improved UX.
data.technical_spec: Clean, modern design with Google Material UI principles.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Users instinctively expect familiar patterns found in other popular services.
data.technical_spec: Consistent navigation structures, predictable interface elements.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Related items are grouped together to simplify complex functions.
data.technical_spec: Strategic layout of content sections and buttons.
